# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.stripe.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.stripe.com
  http:
  - timeout: 30s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 10s
      retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure,refused-stream
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.stripe.com
      weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-auth-service
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - auth0.com
  - "*.auth0.com"
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-auth-service
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - auth0.com
  - "*.auth0.com"
  http:
  - timeout: 15s
    retries:
      attempts: 2
      perTryTimeout: 5s
    route:
    - destination:
        host: auth0.com
      weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-database
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - prod-db.postgres.database.azure.com
  addresses:
  - 10.20.30.40/32
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: tcp-postgres
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 10.20.30.40
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-database
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - prod-db.postgres.database.azure.com
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 5432
    route:
    - destination:
        host: prod-db.postgres.database.azure.com
        port:
          number: 5432
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-mongodb-atlas
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - cluster0.mongodb.net
  - "*.cluster0.mongodb.net"
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 27017
    name: tcp-mongodb
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-mongodb-atlas
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - cluster0.mongodb.net
  - "*.cluster0.mongodb.net"
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 27017
    route:
    - destination:
        host: cluster0.mongodb.net
        port:
          number: 27017
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cloud
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - redis-12345.cloud.redislabs.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 6379
    name: tcp-redis
    protocol: TCP
  - number: 6380
    name: tls-redis
    protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cloud
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - redis-12345.cloud.redislabs.com
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 6380
    route:
    - destination:
        host: redis-12345.cloud.redislabs.com
        port:
          number: 6380
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-s3-storage
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - s3.amazonaws.com
  - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
  - s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-s3-storage
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - s3.amazonaws.com
  - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
  - s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
  http:
  - timeout: 60s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 20s
      retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure
    route:
    - destination:
        host: s3.amazonaws.com
      weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - elasticsearch.prod.example.com
  addresses:
  - 192.168.1.100/32
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 9200
    name: https-es
    protocol: HTTPS
  - number: 9300
    name: tcp-es-transport
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 192.168.1.100
    ports:
      https-es: 9200
      tcp-es-transport: 9300
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - elasticsearch.prod.example.com
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 9200
    timeout: 30s
    retries:
      attempts: 2
      perTryTimeout: 10s
    route:
    - destination:
        host: elasticsearch.prod.example.com
        port:
          number: 9200
---

  namespace: istio-system

  - api.twilio.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-twilio-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.twilio.com
  http:
  - timeout: 20s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 7s
      retryOn: 5xx,gateway-error,reset
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.twilio.com
      weight: 100
---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-mysql-rds
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - prod-mysql.cluster-abc123.us-west-2.rds.amazonaws.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 3306
    name: tcp-mysql
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-mysql-rds
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - prod-mysql.cluster-abc123.us-west-2.rds.amazonaws.com
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 3306
    route:
    - destination:
        host: prod-mysql.cluster-abc123.us-west-2.rds.amazonaws.com
        port:
          number: 3306
---

  - http-intake.logs.datadoghq.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:

    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-datadog-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.datadoghq.com
  - http-intake.logs.datadoghq.com
  http:
  - timeout: 10s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 3s
      retryOn: 5xx,reset
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.datadoghq.com
      weight: 100

  name: external-github-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.github.com
  - github.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  - number: 22
    name: tcp-ssh
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-github-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.github.com
  - github.com
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 443
    timeout: 30s
    retries:
      attempts: 2
      perTryTimeout: 10s
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.github.com
      weight: 100

kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-google-apis
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*.googleapis.com"
  - maps.googleapis.com
  - storage.googleapis.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-google-apis
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*.googleapis.com"
  - maps.googleapis.com
  - storage.googleapis.com
  http:
  - timeout: 30s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 10s
      retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure
    route:
    - destination:
        host: googleapis.com
      weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-prometheus-remote
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - prometheus.prod.example.com
  addresses:
  - 172.16.0.50/32
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 9090
    name: http-prometheus
    protocol: HTTP
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 172.16.0.50
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-prometheus-remote
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - prometheus.prod.example.com
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 9090
    timeout: 60s
    route:
    - destination:
        host: prometheus.prod.example.com
        port:
          number: 9090
---

  - number: 443

    protocol: HTTPS

kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-openai-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.openai.com
  http:
  - timeout: 120s
    retries:
      attempts: 2
      perTryTimeout: 60s
      retryOn: 5xx,reset
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.openai.com
      weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-vault-hashicorp
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - vault.prod.example.com
  addresses:
  - 10.100.50.10/32
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 8200
    name: https-vault
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 10.100.50.10
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-vault-hashicorp
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - vault.prod.example.com
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 8200
    timeout: 10s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 3s
      retryOn: 5xx,reset,refused-stream
    route:
    - destination:
        host: vault.prod.example.com
        port:
          number: 8200
